subparts.text: Name 5 real world applications of Deep Learning. Give brief description of each.
How can predictive model be useful? Explain with two different examples.
It is said that ‘data ‘is most important part of deep learning. Explain with the help of suitable example.
Explain sigmoid function with the help of suitable diagram.
Define Gibbs sampling for training RBMS.
What is meant by Batch normalization? Give suitable example.
What is vectorial representation of words?

questions.question_text: How can we create two different data set for training and testing? Suppose we take hourly temperature of our city for ten years. What would be the best sampling method to work on this data? Justify your answer. What is multilayer perceptron model? Explain with the help of suitable example.
Explain the various gradient descents mechanisms to be used in a deep neural network.
What is the working principle of contractive Autoencoders? Why they are useful. What is the importance of PCA?

you are given a classiferC2 , that works only on two classes say A and B. but you need to build a model for a dataset where the target variables has four classes say A,B,C,D . How can you use C2 to build a classifier for the given dataset? Explain Greedy Layer wise pre-training.
What is the advantage of using CNN models? How is it different from recurrent neural network? Explain the concept of learning vectorial representation of words, with the help of suitable example.

What is the purpose of attention mechanism? Explain in detail giving a suitable example. List five open source data sets used for different purposes. Explain any one of them in detail. How the concept of multidimensionality array reduction can be used on this data set.
Define the contrastive divergence for training RBMS. Explain with the help of suitable example.
What is Trasformer model? Explain its architecture and working with suitable diagram?
